text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems tired, so I<n>suggest we go for a
walk. Soon<n>enough, we're stopped by a few
fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you for your gracious<n>support! I shall
return all your favor<n>with... an opera of gratitude!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... D-did you see theirbeaming faces? My brilliance hascome through once again!
choice_data_list:
Isn't it exhausting to perform an opera each time
you want to thank your fans?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Noblesse oblige. Even in the most<n>inclement of
weather, the sun must<n>rise to bring light to the
world.

On top of her races, her efforts to<n>please her fans
are taking a toll on<n>her. Maybe I should adjust her
racing<n>schedule.
